title: German Sausage Hash
description: A hearty, comforting dish made with charred German sausage, crispy hash browns, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Chop the onion and sauté it in a pan until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Slice the charred German sausage and add it to the pan.
Cook the sausage for a few minutes on each side until lightly browned.
Add the diced hash browns to the pan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the German sausage hash hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
